tagline: B2B cost consulting franchise where executives earn a share of documented client savings with no fees until results are delivered.
description_short: ERA Group is a home-based owner-operated consulting franchise where executives help businesses reduce overhead across 100+ expense categories, earning a percentage of documented savings with no inventory or employees required. Targeting corporate professionals ready to build an executive-level advisory practice, the model generates residual income as client savings are realized over 24-48 months in a $411B US consulting market.
market_intelligence_insight: US management consulting market reached $411.7B in 2026 at a 2.1% CAGR since 2021; global market projected to grow from $334.5B to $564.9B by 2033 at 6.77% CAGR; cost optimization and operations consulting is a leading growth driver as businesses face tariff pressures and rising overhead costs.
item_19_headline: Top quartile full-time franchisees averaged $900566 in Net Cumulative Receipts in 2025
ongoing_support: field coaching,annual conference,proprietary Athena technology platform,marketing fund and materials,peer franchisee network,regional meetings
